sectiondef.header: Register offsets for the GPIO. Each register is 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Mask and Data Register LSW, WO.
Mask and Data Register MSW, WO.

sectiondef.header: Interrupt type reset values for each bank

briefdescription.para: Resets specific to Zynq Ultrascale+ MP.
Resets specific to Zynq Ultrascale+ MP.
Flag for Base Address for PS_GPIO in Versal.
This macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device.
is the register offset to be read.

briefdescription.para: This macro writes to the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device.
is the offset of the register to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the GPIO module by writing reset values to all registers.
